name: Windswept Plateau
description: Open grasslands with scattered features. No natural defenses - every angle is vulnerable. Only for experienced defenders who can create their own chokepoints.

spawnPoints.name: Western Front
spawnPoints.description: Heavy enemy concentrations attack from this direction

spawnPoints.name: Eastern Front
spawnPoints.description: Secondary attack force mirrors western assault

spawnPoints.name: Southwest Flank
spawnPoints.description: Fast raiders attempt to bypass main defenses

spawnPoints.name: Northern Reach
spawnPoints.description: Siege weapons deploy at maximum range

spawnPoints.name: Northern Reach East
spawnPoints.description: Heavy units advance to crush northern defenses

spawnPoints.name: Southern Advance East
spawnPoints.description: Elite units coordinate final southern push

strategy.early_game: Expand quickly to secure resource deposits
strategy.mid_game: Create artificial chokepoints with wall mazes

challenges: No natural barriers to funnel enemies
Resource deposits scattered across dangerous terrain
Enemy paths constantly change based on your walls
Siege weapons have clear line-of-sight to everything
tips: Build walls in layered rings, not straight lines
Force enemies into overlapping tower coverage zones
Mobile hero unit becomes critical for plugging gaps
Plan for strategic retreats to inner defensive rings
